Tooltip.AttackWithSelectedWeapon: Attack using the weapon selected in the active weapon set.
Tooltip.AttackWithSelectedPrimaryWeapon: Attack using the primary weapon in the active weapon set.
Tooltip.AttackWithSelectedSecondaryWeapon: Attack using the secondary weapon in the active weapon set.
Tooltip.AttackWithSelectedShield: Attack using the shield in the secondary slot. Shields also allow Parry against ranged attacks, grant Cover Soak while you have Guard, and may be sacrificed to avoid a Wound.
Tooltip.BraceArmed: Braced weapon: {weapon}. Ignore Unwieldy penalties until the weapon is moved.

Info.ActionsReset: Action economy reset for the current combatant.

Chat.SprintDeclared: {actor} sprints this round. Resolve movement and positioning at the table as appropriate.
Chat.WithdrawDeclared: {actor} withdraws cautiously this round. Resolve disengagement and positioning at the table as appropriate.
Chat.BraceDeclared: {actor} braces {weapon}. Ignore Unwieldy penalties until the weapon is moved.
Chat.AssistLaunchedNormal: Assist is being resolved using the normal table rule.
Chat.AssistLaunchedHouseRule: Assist is being resolved using the configured house rule.

Warning.MaxBonusDice: You cannot buy more than {maxBonusDice} bonus d20 for this roll.

Disabled.NoMovementAction: No Movement action remaining this round.
Disabled.NoActiveWeaponSet: No attack weapon is assigned in the active weapon set.
Disabled.BraceRequiresUnwieldy: Brace requires an Unwieldy weapon in the active weapon set.
Disabled.AlreadyReady: A readied action is already stored for this combatant.
Disabled.AlreadyBraced: The active weapon is already braced.
Disabled.ReadyRequiresCombat: Ready requires an active combatant in combat.
Disabled.BraceRequiresCombat: Brace requires an active combatant in combat.
Disabled.NoSteelyGlare: No Steely Glare attack is available on this actor.

Error.NoChoices: No supported actions are available to ready.

Error.NoSkills: This actor has no available skills.

Chat.Launched: Opened {skill} for {mode}. Resolve the healing from the system roll and Momentum spend.
Opened {skill} to treat {target} ({mode}). Resolve healing from the system roll and Momentum spend.
Opened {skill} to assist {target}. Resolve the assistance on that ally’s action.
Opened {skill} to exploit {target}. On success, the first attack before the end of your next turn gains Piercing 2.

EnableHouseRules.Name: Enable house rules revision
EnableHouseRules.Hint: Enable support for the revised Conan 2d20 rules used in this table.

EnableStressBonusDice.Name: Enable Stress bonus dice
EnableStressBonusDice.Hint: Allow buying bonus d20s with Vigor or Resolve before a roll.

EnableMomentumBonusDice.Name: Enable Momentum bonus dice
EnableMomentumBonusDice.Hint: Allow buying bonus d20s with Momentum before a roll.

EnableDoomBonusDice.Name: Enable Doom bonus dice
EnableDoomBonusDice.Hint: Allow buying bonus d20s with Doom before a roll.

BonusDicePriority.Name: Bonus dice auto-allocation priority
BonusDicePriority.Hint: Choose which source is preferred when auto-allocating bonus dice.

AutoOpenBonusDice.Name: Auto-open bonus dice UI
AutoOpenBonusDice.Hint: Automatically open the bonus dice UI before relevant rolls.

AutoOpenMomentum.Name: Auto-open Momentum UI
AutoOpenMomentum.Hint: Automatically open Momentum spend UI after successful rolls.

AutoPromptDefense.Name: Auto-prompt defense
AutoPromptDefense.Hint: Prompt the defender for Parry or Dodge when applicable.

ShowDoomToPlayers.Name: Show Doom to players
ShowDoomToPlayers.Hint: Allow players to see Doom in the HUD.

AssistMode.Name: Assist mode
AssistMode.Hint: Choose whether Assist should follow the normal table rule or the configured house rule.

MovementEconomyMode.Name: Movement economy
MovementEconomyMode.Hint: Choose whether Sprint and Withdraw also consume the round’s movement allowance in Argon.

Debug.Name: Debug logging
Debug.Hint: Enable verbose console logging for development.
